hero.title: Hello, I'm
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer | AI Integrations | ERP Systems
hero.description: Student at Universidad Tecnológica de Torreón, building enterprise ERP platforms with AI-assisted workflows and fiscal API integrations (SAT/CFDI). Scrum Master, team leader, and developer specialized in backend, mobile and cloud infrastructure.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Passionate developer building ERP systems, AI integrations and fiscal compliance solutions
about.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
about.p1: I am a student at Universidad Tecnológica de Torreón, focused on software development with practical experience in real projects — from web and mobile apps to enterprise ERP dashboards with embedded AI copilots.
about.p2: I specialize in connecting intelligent systems and fiscal compliance APIs into production-grade platforms: Claude AI, OpenAI, LangChain, SAT/CFDI 4.0 integrations, and payment reconciliation with OpenPay and Stripe.

list.title: ABASA ERP Dashboard
list.description: Enterprise resource planning system built with Astro + TypeScript, featuring HR asset management, AI-assisted workflows and fiscal API integrations for Mexican tax compliance (SAT/CFDI 4.0)
highlights: AI copilot for asset management and HR workflows
SAT/CFDI 4.0 fiscal integration — timbrado via PAC
LLM agents with Claude AI and OpenAI
RAG-powered document search over fiscal records
Real-time SAT validation (RFC lookup, CSD status)
Deployed on cloud infrastructure with Docker

list.title: Clinicore
list.description: Comprehensive clinical management system with microservices and embedded software
highlights: Backend with PHP, Laravel and AdonisJS
Embedded software to read weight, height and temperature

list.title: Encrypted Messaging Game
list.description: Interactive game with real-time messaging system and end-to-end encryption

list.title: Integrative Project 2
list.description: iOS mobile application for medical appointment management with REST backend
